embeds.title: ⚔️ APPTIVATORS ACADEMY RULES ⚔️
embeds.description: Welcome to the Front Lines of Creation. This community exists for one reason. To fuel our passions and build a safer, better tomorrow through the power of code. It doesn't matter if you are a **Noob** or a **God** your contribution is the engine of our collective growth.

fields.name: 📋 1. Open Source & Code Sharing
fields.value:
**Freely Shared Code:** Any code viewable in public channels is shared freely for the community to learn from and use.
**Private Collaboration:** Proprietary work should go to private channels available upon request (managed by Admins/Mods/Bots for specific purposes).
**Documentation Requirements:** When sharing/requesting help, provide one:
• The open code snippet directly
• A GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket repository reference
• A direct source link or a clear claim of authorship
**Third-Party Compliance:** Shared material must adhere to the rules/ToS of the originating third-party site.

fields.name: 🔒 2. Malicious Content & Security
fields.value:
**Zero Tolerance for Malware:** If a bot/mod/admin marks code as malicious, it is immediately removed from public view.
**Strike System:** Posting malicious code (phishing/malware/deceptive scripts) triggers a formal strike.
**Immediate Review:** Flagged users are placed "Under Review"; no final ban occurs until full human review completes.

fields.name: ⚖️ 3. Fair Review & Ban Appeals
fields.value:
**Right to Explain:** One (1) chance to explain serious violations; recorded in the case file.
**Agreement Requirement:** A ban requires a finding of fault + unanimous agreement of at least three (3) Admins/Moderators.
**Case Records:** Staff/bot text interactions are kept under a unique Ban File Number.
**Full Disclosure:** Banned members receive a copy of their case file via email (requires a valid email). Failure to participate/provide email results in an automatic final ban.
**Data Destruction:** On confirmed final ban, all code submitted by the member to the server is destroyed.
**Reinstatement:** Moderators may review past bans for reinstatement if new evidence/significant growth is shown.

fields.name: 🤝 4. Community Conduct
fields.value:
**Zero Harassment:** No bullying, hate speech, or harassment.
**No Personal Attacks:** No discrimination/religion/politics bashing; keep personal worldviews out to maintain a creative environment.
**Truthfulness:** No fake news/misinformation/intentional lies; harmful content is removed.

footer.text: ⚔️ One App At A Time • Auto-Pilot
